response.justification: This candidate is a strong general software engineer with 15+ years of experience, but lacks two critical requirements: native-level Japanese proficiency and recent embedded systems/security expertise. Their career trajectory over the past decade has shifted significantly toward web and cloud technologies (TypeScript, Node.js, AWS), moving away from the C/embedded systems work this role requires. Most critically, they show no demonstrated experience with the security technologies (encryption, key exchange, MACsec, 802.1X) or networking protocols (L2/L3, NETCONF, SNMP) that are core to the role.
strengths: Extensive 15+ years of software development experience across multiple domains demonstrating reliability and technical growth
Strong Linux system knowledge and proven DevOps infrastructure expertise (CI/CD, containerization, system administration)
Test-driven development advocate who has built testing frameworks, indicating attention to code quality and correctness
concerns: Missing required native-level Japanese language proficiency—a stated mandatory qualification for this role
No demonstrated experience in security technologies (encryption, key exchange, authentication systems, attack detection) or network protocols essential to embedded security
Career divergence away from embedded systems: recent 5+ years focused entirely on web/cloud (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB) versus the C and kernel-level development this role demands

key_factors.factor: Missing security and networking domain expertise
